description: Control and monitor your Anycubic Kobra 3D printers (S1, Kobra 3) via ioBroker.
cloudModeDesc: Connect via Anycubic Cloud servers. Requires cloud token.
localModeDesc: Direct connection in local network. No cloud required.
howToGetToken: How to get the Cloud Token:
tokenStep2: Sign in with your Anycubic account
cloudTokenHelp: The 344-character token from Anycubic Slicer Next
localPrintersDesc: Enable LAN mode on your printer: Settings > Network > LAN Mode
pollIntervalHelp: How often the printer status is queried (5-300 seconds)
